## Provider Information
<!-- Which provider are you trying to use? -->
- Provider: <!-- e.g., Gemini, OpenAI, Groq, etc. -->
- Are you using a free tier API key? <!-- Yes/No -->

## Issue Description
<!-- Describe the issue you're experiencing -->

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to Settings
2. Enter API key for [provider name]
3. Click "Save" or "Test Key"
4. Observe error

## Error Message
<!-- If applicable, paste the exact error message -->
```
[paste error message here]
```

## API Key Format
<!-- IMPORTANT: DO NOT paste your actual API key! Just describe the format -->
- Does your key start with the expected prefix? (e.g., `sk-` for OpenAI, `AIza` for Gemini)
- Did you copy the entire key without any spaces?

## Troubleshooting Steps Tried
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Verified the API key is valid on the provider's website
- [ ] Tried generating a new API key
- [ ] Cleared browser cache and localStorage
- [ ] Tested in a different browser
- [ ] Checked that the provider's API service is not down

<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->
